title: tussilago micrantha
intro: Tussilago micrantha, also known as small-flowered coltsfoot, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family that grows in mountainous regions. The medicinal properties of Tussilago micrantha include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe irritated throats, reduce inflammation, and ease congestion, making it a popular natural remedy for respiratory conditions. Tussilago micrantha can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
